text:
Great question! You're on the **overview** tab, and your audit shows two recommendations in order of impact:

## 1. **Add named author bylines** [Author Authority] — **CRITICAL** 🎯
This is your top priority. AI agents like ChatGPT and Perplexity heavily weight content with clear author attribution when determining credibility. Adding author names, bios, and structured author schema to your pages will significantly boost your visibility to AI.

**Why it matters:** AI systems treat author authority as a trust signal. Content without a named author is less likely to be cited.

---

## 2. **Fix metadata duplication** [Metadata Freshness] — **HIGH**
Once you've tackled author bylines, address duplicate metadata (titles, descriptions, etc.). This confuses AI crawlers about which version is canonical.

---

## Next steps:
1. Open the **recommendations** tab to see detailed guidance on implementing author bylines
2. Go to the **Setup** tab — it will generate ready-to-deploy files (including author schema blocks) for Next.js
3. Deploy those files to your site
4. Rerun the audit to see your score improve

Since you're on **Next.js** (detected), the Setup tab will give you Next.js-specific code you can drop in.

Want help understanding any of these recommendations, or need guidance on deploying to Next.js?
